purpose: Key-value pair for object metadata. The title is the label (e.g. 'Vendor:'), the text is the value (e.g. 'SAP'). Used in DynamicPageHeader and ObjectPageLayout headers to show object descriptors.
whenToUse: Object header metadata pairs (Vendor: SAP, Version: 1.0.0, Status: Active)
Inside ColumnListItem to show row metadata
When the relationship between a label and a value matters and a Form is overkill
whenNotToUse: For form input fields — use Label + Input
For status that needs color semantic — use ObjectStatus
For numbers that need emphasis — use ObjectNumber
doRules: Always include the title (label) — it gives the value context
Bind title color to sapContent_LabelColor, value color to sapList_TextColor
Use ObjectAttribute in headerContent.meta of DynamicPageTitle
Set active=true only when the value is interactive (drills to detail)
dontRules: Do not omit the title — the label is the whole point
Do not chain more than 4 ObjectAttributes horizontally — readability degrades
Do not use ObjectAttribute for free-form text
Do not nest ObjectAttribute inside another ObjectAttribute

layoutGuidance.placement: Horizontal flow inside DynamicPageHeader metadata band, ObjectPageLayout header, or card body.
layoutGuidance.spacing: 24px gap between ObjectAttribute pairs; 4px gap between title and value within a pair.

contentGuidance.labelLength: Title (label) 1-2 words with trailing colon; text (value) 1-4 words.
contentRules: For numeric values with unit, use ObjectNumber instead

responsiveBehavior.M: May wrap to multiple rows; preserve title-value pairing.
responsiveBehavior.S: Stack vertically; each pair occupies a full row.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Title acts as label; value acts as value. Pair as <dl><dt>title</dt><dd>value</dd></dl> semantically.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Active ObjectAttribute (active=true) is tabbable; otherwise non-interactive.

exceptions: Inside DynamicPageHeader.props.headerContent.meta the plugin auto-generates ObjectAttribute-style pairs from { key, value } tuples — no need to emit ObjectAttribute explicitly in that slot.
